name: harness
description: Planner / Generator / Evaluator loop with split specs, zero-padded sprint IDs, automatic patch sprints, and per-sprint progress.

interface.longDescription: Agentic Harness turns a short product idea into a file-backed loop: Planner writes a short docs/spec.md index, detailed docs/spec/*.md files, zero-padded docs/sprints/sprint-NNN.md contracts, and automatic docs/sprints/sprint-NNN-patch-PPP.md patch contracts; Generator implements one sprint at a time and writes matching docs/progress/sprint-*.md files; Evaluator verifies the result before the next sprint.
defaultPrompt: Use Agentic Harness to build a small web app.
Start a Planner -> Generator -> Evaluator loop.
